get.description: The optimizer console overview (frontend data model §Optimizer plans, key ["optimizer-fleet"]): each greenhouse's latest cycle outcome plus site aggregates (open-escalation backlog, counts by outcome, oldest-open age). Proxied/aggregated by the Go API from the optimizer's GET /api/optimizer/fleet (optimizer interfaces). Polled, not streamed. Open to anyone — reads need no token (anonymous-viewer posture, platform security §4).
